titleOfWork: The Life Aquatic with Steve Zissou
synopsis: A melancholy auteur-captain whose Steve energy arrives wrapped in vanity, grief, and excellent knitwear.
editorialBlurb: Steve Zissou is what happens when Steve becomes an aging artistic institution unto himself. He is managerial, theatrical, insecure, and still somehow grand enough to pull the viewer into his weather. It is a rarer movie Steve lane: less brute-force nuisance, more collapsing self-mythology.
whyItMatters: He broadens the archive toward high-design, auteur-coded Steve energy and proves the name can carry loneliness as well as comedy.
sourceNotes: Title character in The Life Aquatic with Steve Zissou.
